notes: Initial Fiorell.IA product-layer manifest. No training run and no runtime change.
Prompt-only candidate for behavior, refusal and answer-template evaluation. No runtime change.
Prepare 100-300 reviewed behavior-first examples with unsupported_abstention as a first-class category. No model training yet.
First local LoRA candidate only after dataset review and prompt-only eval. Must not replace RAG or teach unsupported memory answers.
Evaluation planning asset for shared baseline, prompt-only, dataset-v1 and lora-v1 comparisons. No runtime change.
Release decision rules for evaluation-ready beta validation. Rejects false answers, invented citations, weakened abstention and answers broader than retrieved evidence.

Manual Fiorell.IA eval executed against shared runtime without runtime changes. Score-only produced 11 false answers on Fiorell.IA set; domain-gate diagnostic reduced to 4 false answers but unsupported_abstention remains weak.
